---
title: "Supervision"
---

::: {.section-title}
## Supervision

Prospective HDR students are welcome in health economics, discrete choice experiments, eye tracking, clinical outcomes assessment, behavioural economics, and related areas.
:::

::: {.metrics}
::: {.metric}
<div class="num">5</div><div class="label">Current supervisions listed</div>
:::
::: {.metric}
<div class="num">4</div><div class="label">Completed supervisions listed</div>
:::
:::

::: {.grid-2}
::: {.card}
### Potential supervision areas
<span class="tag">Health economics</span>
<span class="tag">Discrete choice experiments</span>
<span class="tag">Eye tracking</span>
<span class="tag">Clinical outcomes assessment</span>
<span class="tag">Vaccine policy</span>
<span class="tag">Telehealth</span>
<span class="tag">Economic evaluation</span>
:::
::: {.card}
### Before contacting
Please send a CV, academic transcripts/GPA, research interests, writing sample if available, and any publications or working papers.
:::
:::
